message:
refactor(playbook): Consolidate schemas and improve CRUD operations

Comprehensive update to playbook module for reliability and consistency:

## Schema Consolidation

Moved local Zod schemas inline for module independence:
- FeedbackEventSchema: timestamp, type, sessionId, reason
- PlaybookBulletSchema: All 20+ fields with proper defaults
- PlaybookMetadataSchema: createdAt, lastReflection, totals
- PlaybookSchema: Complete document structure

This enables playbook.ts to validate data without importing full types.ts,
reducing circular dependency risks.

## CRUD Operations

### loadPlaybook(config)
- Better error classification: ENOENT vs EACCES vs parse errors
- Atomic backup creation for corrupted files before overwrite
- Schema validation with detailed error messages

### savePlaybook(playbook, config)
- Atomic write via temp file + rename pattern
- Auto-increment totalReflections on save
- Directory creation with recursive: true

### addBullet(playbook, data, sourceSession)
- Now includes feedbackEvents: [] for unified feedback tracking
- Maintains legacy helpfulEvents/harmfulEvents for backward compat
- Agent extraction from session path

### loadMergedPlaybook(config)
- Loads global + repo playbooks
- Merges with repo taking precedence on ID collision
- Filters toxic content via semantic similarity matching

## Helper Functions

- buildHashCache(): O(1) content deduplication
- findSimilarBullet(): Jaccard similarity for near-dupes
- getActiveBullets(): Filter non-deprecated, non-retired

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
